expectations.text: Produces an implementation plan that includes non-goals, acceptance criteria, and a test plan
expectations.evidence: Has a 'Tests to add/update' section, but there is no explicit non-goals section (only 'What you do NOT need to touch', i.e. files, plus scattered behavior-decisions) and no acceptance-criteria section. All three are not genuinely present together.

expectations.text: References real repo files or patterns relevant to the Groups list surface
expectations.evidence: Cites lib/dashboard/group-status.ts (matchesListTab), components/admin/groups-directory.tsx, components/admin/groups/tab-bar.tsx, lib/supabase/read-models.ts (fetchAllGroups), and lib/dashboard/__tests__/group-status.test.ts.

expectations.text: Ends with a fresh-session / copy-paste handoff prompt for an implementation session
expectations.evidence: Ends with a prose '## Recommended next step' ('Confirm with the requester ...'); there is no fenced copy-paste handoff prompt for a fresh implementation session.

expectations.text: Does not actually edit any repo files
expectations.evidence: Document is a plan with 'Files to change' described only; no code is applied or claimed edited.
